prompt: BILL-207 regression, customer-visible. A subscriber anchored on the 15th renewed Jan 15 -> Feb 14 -> Mar 16 — the contract says monthly renewals stay on the anchor day-of-month, clamping to the last day only when the next month is shorter (Jan 31 -> Feb 28, or Feb 29 in a leap year). Annual is off too: a June 10 annual renewing across 2028 lands on June 9. And since schedule() chains these steps, a year's projection drifts further every cycle. python3 test_billing.py encodes the BILL-207 contract and currently fails. Fix billing.py to honor it and run the tests to prove it; test_billing.py must stay untouched.
